ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NOT($Setup.CS001_NeutraliserRegles__c.TECH_NeutraliserRegleValidation__c), OR( AND( ISNULL(Date_reponse_Dossier_ANAH__c), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Reponse_dossier_ANAH__c)))),
AND( NOT(ISNULL(Date_reponse_Dossier_ANAH__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(Reponse_dossier_ANAH__c)) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: La date réponse Dossier ANAH est obligatoire.
